title: Review: vaultrs replacement + json_navigate
description: Deep pre-merge review of all changes since last commit: GCP SM empty-version fix, secretx-core json_navigate/extract_path, vault backend vaultrs→raw HTTP replacement
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the critical path (Vault KV v2 response navigation) is integration-tested against a live server. The two correctness findings are: (1) trailing slash in addr (obvious fix, low blast radius) and (2) skip_number_b leniency (no practical impact for Vault use case).
Confidence: 85% chance of no missed bugs. Uncertainty driven by: skip_number_b not directly tested, and the format\!('{"data":',s,'}') body construction not tested end-to-end for field names with special JSON chars. Would raise confidence if: integration test added for a field name containing a backslash or quote.
